### Environment Info
<!-- Please fill out the following details -->
- **Deployment Type:** [e.g. Cloud (SaaS) / Self-Hosted (OSS) / Both]
- **OS / Platform:** [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows Server 2022 / Docker]
- **Version:** [e.g. Commit Hash `a1b2c3d` or Release `v1.0.2`]

### Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Logs / Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or paste the server logs (redact secrets!) to help explain your problem.
